text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki and I are working toward the Arima
Kinen, but we need breaks too. On one particular
rest day...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, let's celebrate early! It's close
enough to the 25th, right?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Might I interest you in a production of Romeo and Juliet?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And that's how we end up going to watch a play
together.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What a great rendition! Even though I knew how
the play would end, I still cried.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"Thou desperate pilot, now at once run on the
dashing rocks thy seasick weary bark! Here’s to
my love."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
"O true apothecary, thy drugs are quick. Thus
with a kiss I die."

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now I remember how difficult those lines are! I
wanted to get them just right, so I practiced a lot.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right, you don't know. I played Romeo in my
youth troupe.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I remember being really nervous because it was
the first main role that I earned the chance to
play.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I muttered lines under my breath all day long at
home until my mom got angry at me!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. This sure brings me back. I never would
have thought back then that I'd change my path
to racing.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Listening to Fuji Kiseki tell me about her
childhood, our trip back to campus seems to take
no time at all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for coming out with me today! Even
though it's a bit early, I truly felt a festive cheer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oh, before I forget, I have a gift for you!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Consider it a token of my gratitude. Thank you
for everything you do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I look at the neatly wrapped box. It looks like
there might be a piece of jewelry inside.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: The stone has a special meaning.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It means, "May our bond remain eternal." I
imbued it with this wish.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I open the box to find a necklace inside with a
small diamond that sparkles like sunlight glinting
off the ocean.
choice_data_list: Is it all right if I put it on now?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to put it on, but the clasp is small and my
fingers are clumsy. As I'm struggling...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Let me see it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes the necklace from me and has it
clasped around my neck in no time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
It looks great on you. I'm glad I chose a smaller
stone.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want it to be too flashy, since I was
hoping you'd wear it every day...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Don't take that too seriously! Anyway, good
night!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This day with Fuji Kiseki becomes one of my
warmest and loveliest memories.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: It looks just as nice on you as I thought it would.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That means a lot to me. Also, um...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That vending machine sells really tasty hot
cocoa. Do you want to try it?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Sorry. That was a bit random, wasn't it?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What I mean to say is... the day feels like it went
by really fast.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I was hoping we could spend some more time
together... if that's all right with you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Here you go. It's hot, so be careful.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The cocoa Fuji Kiseki hands me is sweeter and
more delicious than I expected it to be.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for spending time with me despite how
busy you are. I really appreciate it.
choice_data_list: I'm glad you invited me out.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're too nice for your own good.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You know...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: When I was young, I couldn't understand the ending of Romeo and Juliet at all.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I didn't get why the two of them pined so
desperately for each other.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And I wondered what it would feel like to have
someone so precious to me that I would rather die
than be without them.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But now, I finally understand what it means to
have a truly irreplaceable person in my life.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Could it be because I've grown older and wiser...
or because I've met you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: I wonder... Which do you think it is?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Haha! I'm just messing with you. Did your heart
skip a beat?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki looks at me with an impish expression
filled with smiles and mischief.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Oho? What's wrong? Your face is all red.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This day with Fuji Kiseki becomes one of my
warmest and loveliest memories.
